mood: glossy outlaw bar-kitsch filtered through a translucent coral evidence veil
material_language: wet brine-green lacquer with sharp specular highlights
black-green casino felt and worn pool-table baize
translucent coral acetate overlays and fogged photo panels
chrome trim with pink and blue neon spill
album-sleeve cardboard coasters and scuffed jukebox inserts
pine needles, dusk haze, and smoky bar varnish
lighting: Low lounge light under a warm coral wash: hard pink rim highlights, amber tabletop pools, blue-green edge spill, and ghosted overexposed layers like a damaged photo transparency.
object_inventory: one dominant central felt-table collision of glossy garnish-like figures and source-bearing coasters
two hero-scale translucent vertical photo slabs cutting through the composition like pink acetate shutters
small occult and ufology scrap islands embedded into the table surface
soft garden-shadow apertures and pine-haze textures leaking in from the outer edges
chrome arcs, pool-ball circles, and crooked neon bands that organize the chaos without becoming signage
negative_constraints: no legible words, interface labels, filenames, source taxonomy, or alphanumeric callouts inside the image
do not copy the reference subject or reproduce a specific tweet, album cover, logo, browser page, or app interface
avoid desks, dashboards, office rooms, clean card grids, shelves, cabinets, archive walls, and generic software UI
avoid misty shrine, observatory, canopy-field, lantern-habitat, or plate-repair metaphors from recent editions
keep source anchors physical and embedded in the scene, not floating summaries or screenshots
do not let the garden references overpower the lounge-noir tableau
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
